title: Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple
tagline: Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple — spiritual town of Telangana

heroImage.alt: Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple, Telangana

overview.short: Sri Sri Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara Swamy Devalayam is located in Vilasagar village of Karimnagar district in the state of Telangana, India.
overview.description: Sri Sri Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara Swamy Devalayam is located in Vilasagar village of Karimnagar district in the state of Telangana, India. It is one of the unique ancient Shiva temples where three linga's in three inner sanctums (garbha gruha) in one temple facing east, north and south. Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple is situated 23 kilometers from Karimnagar town and 12 kilometers from Vemulawada known as “southern kasi”.

topPlaces.name: Bommalagutta
topPlaces.description: Bommalagutta (also known as Siddhula Gutta, Bommalamma Talli Gutta and Vrushabhadri Hill) is a Jain centre situated near Kurikyala village of Karimnagar district in Telangana. This Jain center is situated 3 km from another famous Jain center Kulpakji.

topPlaces.name: Kothapalli (Haveli)
topPlaces.description: Kothapalli (Haveli) (Telugu: కొత్తపల్లి), or Kothapalli, is a Revenue Village and a semi-town in Kothapalli Mandal, Karimnagar district, Telangana, India. The village used to be in the Karimnagar mandal of the old Karimnagar district.

topPlaces.name: Boinpalle mandal
topPlaces.description: Boinpalle or Boinpalli is a mandal in Rajanna Sircilla district in the state of Telangana in India.

items.note: Bommalagutta (also known as Siddhula Gutta, Bommalamma Talli Gutta and Vrushabhadri Hill) is a Jain centre situated near Kurikyala village of Karimnagar district in Telangana. This Jain center is situated 3 km from another famous Jain center Kulpakji.

Kothapalli (Haveli) (Telugu: కొత్తపల్లి), or Kothapalli, is a Revenue Village and a semi-town in Kothapalli Mandal, Karimnagar district, Telangana, India. The village used to be in the Karimnagar mandal of the old Karimnagar district.
Boinpalle or Boinpalli is a mandal in Rajanna Sircilla district in the state of Telangana in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (157 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (134 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Trilinga Sanghameshwara swamy temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bommalagutta, Kothapalli (Haveli), Boinpalle mandal.
